/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/mysql.dir/__/sql-common/net_ns.cc.o CMakeFiles/mysql.dir/completion_hash.cc.o CMakeFiles/mysql.dir/mysql.cc.o CMakeFiles/mysql.dir/pattern_matcher.cc.o CMakeFiles/mysql.dir/readline.cc.o CMakeFiles/mysql.dir/client_query_attributes.cc.o CMakeFiles/mysql.dir/multi_factor_passwordopt-vars.cc.o CMakeFiles/mysql.dir/common/user_registration.cc.o -o ../runtime_output_directory/mysql  ../archive_output_directory/libmysqlclient.a base/libclient_base.a ../extra/libedit/libedit-20240808-3.1/src/libedit.a ../archive_output_directory/libmysqlclient.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libresolv.so -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libresolv.so -lm -lcurses
